[{'text': "I'm now facing north (102.7°). I need to face east to go back right. Let me rotate to face east (0°). I need to rotate clockwise by about 90° from north to get to east.

Actually, looking at the heading: 102.7° is roughly north. To face east (0°), I need to rotate -90° (clockwise).

Wait, let me reconsider. The yaw convention: 0° = east, 90° = north, 180°/-180° = west, -90° = south. So 102.7° is slightly past north (toward west). To face east (0°), I need to rotate -102.7° (clockwise).

Let me rotate to face east.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01Wz9Ure6iuP2rHZ3tWXV1aR', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
